message:
feat(websocket): add RFC 6455 frame codec (bd-r4hu)

Implement WebSocket wire format parsing per RFC 6455:
- Frame struct with FIN, RSV1-3, opcode, mask, payload
- FrameCodec implementing Decoder/Encoder traits
- Support for all opcodes: text, binary, ping, pong, close
- Proper masking/unmasking for client/server roles
- CloseCode enum with standard status codes
- Validation: reserved bits, control frame size, fragmentation

All 16 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
